query_result.output_text: Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the answer.
query_result.reasoning:
Now I have all the information confirmed:

**Q4 FY 2025 Pre-tax margin guidance:** 10.8% to 10.9%
**Q4 FY 2025 Actual pre-tax margin:** 11.6%

The actual result of 11.6% is above the guidance range of 10.8-10.9%. So TJX **beat** its guidance.

To calculate the BPS (basis points) difference, I need to compare the actual to the guidance. The standard way to express this would be comparing to the high end of the guidance (since the question asks about beating or missing guidance).

From the transcript: "70 basis points above the high end of our plan"
High end of guidance: 10.9%
Actual: 11.6%
Difference: 11.6% - 10.9% = 0.70% = 70 basis points

So TJX beat its Q4 FY 2025 pre-tax margin guidance by 70 basis points.
